check.command: sqlcmd -h -1 -W -Q "SET NOCOUNT ON; SELECT CAST(value_in_use AS varchar(1)) FROM sys.configurations WHERE name = 'Remote Access';"

candidate_check.description: The "Remote Access" feature must be disabled unless specifically required and approved.

check_content_excerpt:
To determine if [Remote Access] is enabled, execute the following command:
SELECT name, value, value_in_use
FROM sys.configurations
WHERE name = 'Remote Access'
 
If [value_in_use] is a [1], review the system documentation to determine whether the use of [Remote Access] is approved. If it is not approved, this is a finding.
title: The "Remote Access" feature must be disabled unless specifically required and approved.
